title: Eyrythalia carinata
taxonomy: Eyrythalia carinata is classified within the plant family Euphorbiaceae, which is commonly known as the spurge family. This plant family is a large and diverse group, encompassing around 6,000 species across the world. Eyrythalia carinata is a genus of flowering plants that is native to tropical Africa. The Euphorbiaceae family is characterized by its wide range of growth habits, including trees, shrubs, and herbs. The classification of Eyrythalia carinata within the Euphorbiaceae family suggests its adaptations to the tropical environment of its native region.
